text:
Personal information obtained by an agency in connection with a motor vehicle record shall be disclosed to a requestor who:

(1) is the subject of the information; or

(2) demonstrates, in such form and manner as the agency requires, that the requestor has obtained the written consent of the person who is the subject of the information.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 730. Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act
##### § 730.006 — Required Disclosure with Consent

Personal information obtained by an agency in connection with a motor vehicle record shall be disclosed to a requestor who:

    (1) is the subject of the information; or

    (2) demonstrates, in such form and manner as the agency requires, that the requestor has obtained the written consent of the person who is the subject of the information.

*Acts 2021, 87th Leg., R.S., Ch. 935 (S.B.15), Sec. 6, eff. June 18, 2021.*

subsections.text: Personal information obtained by an agency in connection with a motor vehicle record shall be disclosed to a requestor who:
is the subject of the information; or
demonstrates, in such form and manner as the agency requires, that the requestor has obtained the written consent of the person who is the subject of the information.
